candidate_title: The PRISMA 2020 statement: an updated guideline for reporting systematic reviews.

source_record_provenance.record_title: The PRISMA 2020 statement: an updated guideline for reporting systematic reviews.

criterion_mapping.criterion_text: Stage 1 criterion: Evidence does not clearly indicate an audio-domain preference-learning signal in the abstract; evidence remains inconclusive.

decision_rationale: The Stage 2 full-text evidence still shows unclear or insufficient signals regarding audio-domain preference-learning and RL-loop indicators; no direct positive evidence is present, maintaining a maybe outcome pending full-text confirmation.

candidate_title: Ordinal learning for emotion recognition in customer service calls

source_record_provenance.record_title: Ordinal learning for emotion recognition in customer service calls

criterion_mapping.criterion_text: Paper pertains to preference learning, defined as ranking or A/B comparison of two or more audio clips; numeric ratings count only when converted to rankings; preferences may be human or synthetic; papers without explicit comparisons are still eligible when they contain an RL training loop for an audio model.

decision_rationale: The full-text evidence directly supports preference learning in the audio domain and shows no exclusion trigger.
